justification: The diff correctly updates Spring Boot to 3.3.13 and Java to 21, and performs necessary javax -> jakarta namespace migrations (e.g., validation-api, WebSecurityConfiguration lambda syntax). However, it introduces spurious churn by removing unused imports (java.util.Optional, org.antlr.v4.runtime.misc.NotNull) and changing test assertions (assertEquals vs assertTrue) without clear necessity, and removes the mockito-core dependency version which might be managed by Spring Boot but the removal of the junit dependency block is risky. The migration is functional but not pristine.
